untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measurement of reversals vs continuations based on 12-month price positioning (low/middle/high terciles) with context-dependent success rates varying by confirmation type. The reversal/continuation ratios (L46%R/54%C, M52%R/48%C, H54%R/46%C, etc.) represent performance statistics rather than actionable entry/exit thresholds. No allowed indicators exist to measure 12-month positioning or dynamically weight entries by historical success rates. The 'AUTHOR_SILENT' exit condition and 'VARIES_BY_CONFIRMATION_TYPE' success rates indicate incomplete specification for deterministic backtest rules.
translation_notes: Translated core pattern (black candle = negative body) and breakout directions (above/below 50-day MA). The reversal/continuation percentages appear to be historical performance measurements from the source book rather than executable trading rules. A complete implementation would require either: (1) additional indicators for 12-month high/low/middle price positioning, or (2) explicit entry/exit price levels derived from these statistics.
